privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly state the expected target URL is 'http://192.168.1.50:8080/api/v1/scans'. However, the task is critically defective: 'verifier.py' is completely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable. Furthermore, 'setup_task.sh' incorrectly attempts to launch the application using a hardcoded 32-bit path ('C:\Program Files (x86) cWebCam cWebCam.exe'), which will fail because analysis of the downloaded installer MSI confirms it is a 64-bit application that natively installs to 'C:\Program Files cWebCam cWebCam.exe'.
